strings.filter.placeholder: Filter by name, slot or product ID
strings.filter.save_bulk_tooltip: Save bulk proposals and apply to SD
strings.table.name: Name
strings.dialog.language.title: Choose language
strings.dialog.language.heading: Choose language
strings.dialog.language.message: Select the language for OpenMenu GDEMU Manager. You can change it later from the Language menu.
strings.dialog.cover_preview.subtitle: Slot {slot} | Product ID {product}
strings.dialog.confirm_apply.title: Apply SD changes
strings.dialog.confirm_apply.action_delete: will move {count} game(s) to internal trash
strings.dialog.confirm_apply.message: The app will write to {root}. It {actions}.
strings.dialog.confirm_apply.large_note: Large operation: do not disconnect the SD or turn off the PC during the process. A full backup remains optional, but is recommended before moving or deleting many games. Removed games will remain in the SD internal trash.
strings.dialog.confirm_apply.slot_note: The app does not format the SD. It uses temporary folders and internal trash first, then rebuilds OpenMenu. It also creates an automatic technical backup of folder 01.
strings.dialog.confirm_apply.cover_note: The app does not touch game folders; it rebuilds OpenMenu and creates an automatic technical backup of 01.
strings.dialog.provider.title: Online sources
strings.dialog.provider.intro: Enable cover sources. The recommended source does not require an account; advanced sources may require your own credentials.
strings.dialog.provider.name: Name
strings.dialog.about.title: About OpenMenu GDEMU Manager
strings.updates.available.title: Update available
strings.updates.current.title: Up to date
strings.updates.current: You are using the latest available version ({current}).
strings.scan.display_failed: Scan finished, but failed to show results: {message}
strings.product_id.prompt_body: The app found games whose Product ID does not match their folder or the real disc serial. This can make openMenu miss their covers. You can save now to rebuild the menu with these corrections.
strings.scan_repair.prompt_body: The app found OpenMenu indexes or physical slots that do not match the real game folders. This can cause empty, untitled, or coverless games on the console. You can save now to compact slots, fix Product ID values, and rebuild the menu.
strings.scan_repair.missing_slots: Slots without a matching physical folder: {slots}.
strings.scan_repair.compaction_consequence: During repair, {count} later folder(s) will move to close those gaps.
strings.scan_repair.warning.folder_without_menu_: physical folder has no OpenMenu entry
strings.scan_repair.warning.menu_entry_without_f: menu entry has no physical folder
strings.slot_recovery.title: Incomplete slot transaction
strings.slot_recovery.pending: There is a pending slot transaction; changes will not be applied until it is resolved.
strings.path.missing:
The path does not exist yet:
{path}
strings.template.trusted_warning:
Install templates only from trusted sources.

The package may contain images and audio. The user is responsible for using assets with a valid license.
strings.template.no_music: The active template has no music.
strings.game.added_memory: {count} game(s) added in memory. Save changes is pending.{suffix}
strings.game.no_slots: Not enough free slots between 02 and 127.
strings.game.no_slots_status: Not enough free slots to add games.
strings.game.added_one: Game added in memory. Save changes is pending.
strings.game.discard_new_title:
Discard the new game from slot {slot}?
{name}
strings.save.none: No pending game changes to apply.
strings.save.running: A save operation is already running.
strings.save.confirm:
Apply pending changes to the SD/backup?

This can copy games, update OpenMenu files and move deleted slots to the Windows Recycle Bin.
strings.bulk.enabled: Bulk mode enabled. Uncheck games you do not want to process.
strings.bulk.no_targets: There are no games marked to process.
strings.bulk.running: A bulk search is already running.
strings.bulk.summary: Bulk search: {processed} processed, {auto} auto, {review} review, {skipped} skipped, {errors} errors.
strings.bulk.summary_apply: Bulk search: {processed} processed, {auto} auto, {review} review, {skipped} skipped, {errors} errors. {saveable} proposals ready; press the green disk button to apply to the SD.
strings.bulk.save_ready_tooltip: {count} proposals ready. Save and rebuild SD menu.
strings.bulk.finished_failed: Search finished, but the UI update failed: {message}
strings.bulk.save_running: A bulk save is already running.
strings.bulk.no_valid: There are no valid proposals to save.
strings.bulk.no_proposals: There were no proposals to save.
strings.report.title: Export report
strings.setup.scan_first: Scan an SD or GDEMU/OpenMenu folder first.
strings.dialog.bulk.title: Bulk search
strings.dialog.add.title: Add games
strings.dialog.add.heading: Add games to the SD
strings.dialog.add.description: Select one or more .gdi/.cdi files, or add one or more game folders. The app will inspect those paths and add them as pending changes.
strings.dialog.add.pick_folders_tip: Select one or more game folders
strings.dialog.add.remove_tip: Remove selected entries from the list
strings.dialog.add.select_one: Select at least one compatible game.
strings.dialog.add.rejected_paths:
Skipped paths that do not contain compatible GDI/CDI games:
{paths}
strings.dialog.add.folder_help: Select one or more folders. Use Ctrl or Shift to select multiple folders.
strings.dialog.backup.title: Back up SD card
strings.dialog.backup.heading: Do you want to back up your SD card data?
strings.dialog.backup.message: The selected path appears to be a viable GDEMU/OpenMenu SD or backup. Before scanning and allowing changes, explicitly choose whether to create a backup.
strings.dialog.backup.warning: Recommendation: create the backup on your hard drive, not inside the SD. If you continue without backup, the app will remember this decision for this structure.
strings.dialog.backup.folder_confirm:
Consideration before continuing:

The destination folder already contains data:

{path}

If you continue, the backup may overwrite files with the same name. The safest option is to use an empty folder or create a new one.
strings.dialog.backup.skip_confirm:
You will continue without creating a backup for this SD.

If you apply changes later, the app will write to the selected SD/backup. You can create a manual backup from Settings.

Confirm that you want to continue without backup?
strings.dialog.candidate.heading: Search and manual correction
strings.dialog.candidate.few_results: Few results ({count}). Try manual web search or add local sources.
strings.dialog.candidate.results: {count} unique candidates found. Review visually before selecting.
strings.dialog.candidate.no_new_results: No new covers found. Showing {count} saved or previously known results.
strings.dialog.candidate.name_required: Write a name before saving it.
strings.dialog.candidate.name_saved_status: Name saved locally. You can keep searching with any text.
strings.dialog.setup.title: GDEMU/OpenMenu - Setup Assistant
strings.dialog.setup.heading: Prepare SD Card for GDEMU/OpenMenu
strings.dialog.setup.subtitle: Validates the SD before scanning or writing Dreamcast games.
strings.dialog.setup.select_sd: Select an SD card or backup folder.
strings.dialog.setup.install_confirm:
OpenMenu base will be installed in the selected path.

The app will revalidate that the path is empty and will not delete existing files.
strings.dialog.setup.backup_skipped: Backup suggestion skipped for this SD.
strings.dialog.setup.message.prepare:
The SD does not have a GDEMU/OpenMenu structure.

You can install the OpenMenu base to start adding games. No games will be copied yet and existing content will not be deleted.
strings.dialog.setup.message.dangerous: To protect your data, the app blocked reading/writing. Use an empty SD, an SD with GDEMU/OpenMenu structure, or a clean backup folder.
strings.dialog.setup.message.not_fat32: Format or prepare the SD as FAT32 before using it with GDEMU.
strings.dialog.setup.message.possible_corruption: Check the SD outside the app before trying to write changes.
strings.dialog.setup.message.scan_only: You can inspect the structure, but saving changes is blocked.
strings.dialog.setup.message.write_allowed: You can scan and apply changes.
